emails.subject: RE: Confidentiality agreement
emails.body: We do have another CA with Ameresco; however, there is no conflict between the two agreements. Kay, we would appreciate your deal team not engaging in any discussions with Ameresco regarding any other deal we may be working on with them. Kay, I do not have any comments on the language limiting our involvement with your proposed transaction to be only with Ameresco. Thanks. Lance. W. Lance Schuler Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3826 Houston, Texas 77002 Phone: 713/853-5419 Fax: 713/646-3393 Email: lance.schuler-legal@enron.com Mark Metts/Enron@EnronXGate 05/14/2001 04:45 PM
